title: Superintendent
notes: Very small rural district (Swisher/Randall/Castro Co); no dedicated ECE staff. Superintendent is the appropriate decision-maker. District transitioned to 4-day school week in 2024.

title: Superintendent
notes: Small rural district in Castro County (Texas Panhandle). No dedicated ECE staff; superintendent is target. Christa Chambers (christa.chambers@hartisd.net) serves as District Assistant Principal.

title: Superintendent
notes: Small rural district (Jones County). No dedicated ECE staff. Domain uses ESC14 hosting which is district-owned not ESC-staff (district email pattern). PK-12, ~750 students.

title: Assistant Superintendent
notes: Asst Supt is best curriculum-side contact. Superintendent Jaime Clark (jaime.clark@henrietta-isd.net) is secondary. District oversees C&I including elementary.

title: Superintendent
notes: Tiny rural district on Bolivar Peninsula (Galveston Co). Only 2 district administrators. Superintendent is the curriculum decision-maker. New $27.9M school construction underway.

title: Executive Director of Academics
notes: Email pattern inferred from district format (first initial + lastname @ hitchcockisd.org); ZoomInfo confirms k***@hitchcockisd.org. Oversees PK-12 curriculum. Sarah Saenz is Curriculum Coordinator (secondary).

title: Superintendent
notes: Email inferred from district pattern (district uses lastname or first-initial+lastname); confirmed superintendent. ~890 PK-12 students. Uses TEKS Resource System as curriculum. No dedicated ECE staff.

title: Coordinator of Prekindergarten
notes: Larger 6A suburban district near Fort Worth. PreK programs include Early Start (Head Start blend), Core Knowledge Pre-K (tuition-based), and state half-day. Curriculum based on TEA PreK Guidelines + Core Knowledge.

title: Superintendent
notes: Very small rural district (Scurry/Mitchell Co), ~315 PK-12 students at single campus. No dedicated ECE staff. Superintendent is decision-maker. Domain uses ESC14 hosting but is district-owned.

title: Assistant Superintendent
notes: Asst Supt oversees curriculum/T&L. Superintendent Brad Burnett is secondary contact. ~1,000 student PK-12 district in Jack County (Region 9).

title: Director of Curriculum, Instruction & Learning Loss
notes: Email pattern inferred from district format and confirmed via ZoomInfo (j***@jhcisdpk12.org). Superintendent Dr. Susana P. Garza is secondary. ~993 students in Hebbronville. Title includes 'Learning Loss' suggesting HB 3 Reading Academy focus.

title: Superintendent
notes: Small district uses jisdtx.us domain (also jourdantonisd.net). No dedicated ECE Director; superintendent is decision-maker. Heather Halfmann and Candice Ray serve as ELAR Instructional Curriculum Coaches.

title: Director of Early Learning
notes: Strong fit - dedicated ECE Director. Large suburban district near Fort Worth (~35K students). Oversees Keller Early Learning Centers North and South. Previously KELC South principal for 5 years.

title: Deputy Superintendent of Curriculum and Student Services
notes: Email inferred from district pattern (confirmed v***@kennedaleisd.net via ZoomInfo - likely jvu). 2,800 PK-12 students in DFW. James A. Arthur Early Childhood Center is the ECE campus.

title: Superintendent
notes: Email inferred from district pattern (b***@knippaisd.net confirmed via ZoomInfo). Tiny rural district in Uvalde County. No dedicated ECE staff. Elda Alejandro listed as District Business Manager.

title: Executive Director of Curriculum & Instruction
notes: Email pattern inferred from standard district format. Located at C&I Lee Facility, 400 S. West St, La Feria. Cameron County district in Region 1 (RGV).

title: Executive Director of Curriculum & Instruction and Federal Programs
notes: Small RGV district (~538 students). Combines curriculum and federal programs role. Superintendent is Robert Munoz.

title: Director of Curriculum & Instruction
notes: Domain uses ESC17 hosting but is district-owned (lamesa.esc17.net). Dr. Bonnie Avey is Superintendent (bavey@lamesa.esc17.net). Dawson County district.

title: Superintendent
notes: Small rural RGV district (~352 students) in Willacy County. No dedicated ECE staff. Superintendent participates in Rural Learner-Centered Leadership Lab.

title: Interim Superintendent
notes: Tiny rural district (1 PK-12 school) in Gray County (Panhandle). 0.19 district admin FTE - superintendent is the only district leader. Ashley Brauchi is Principal.

title: Director of Early Childhood Education
notes: Strong fit - dedicated ECE Director (transitioned from Dir of Elementary Ed). Email pattern inferred from district format (first.last@libertyhill.txed.net) and confirmed k***@ via ZoomInfo. Oversees PreK programming, Louine Noble Early Learning Center. Fast-growing Austin-area district.

title: Superintendent
notes: Small district in Lamb County (~1,200 students). A+ TEA-accredited. Recent bond for new HS construction. No dedicated ECE staff - superintendent is decision-maker. Staci Sumners is Primary Principal.

title: Superintendent
notes: Very small rural district (~276 students, single school) in Mills/Lampasas Co. Moore announced resignation effective June 30, 2026. Leadership transition signal. Maela Edmonson is Elementary Principal.

title: Superintendent
notes: Small rural district 15 miles east of Lubbock in Crosby County. PK-12. No dedicated ECE staff - superintendent is decision-maker.

title: Superintendent
notes: Tiny rural district (~104 students) in Shackelford/Jones Co. Only 1 district administrator. Domain uses ESC14 hosting but is district-owned. Email pattern inferred from district convention.

title: Superintendent
notes: Tiny PK-8 district in Bowie County (New Boston). Single school. No HS - students transfer for high school. No dedicated ECE staff - superintendent is decision-maker.

notes: Strong fit - dedicated C&I Director. Superintendent Dr. Don Beck (secondary). Guadalupe County district near San Antonio.

notes: Strong fit - dedicated C&I Director (also Title IX Coordinator). Superintendent Dr. Todd White; Asst Supt Dr. Veronica Gutierrez. San Patricio County district.

notes: Tiny rural district (~189 students) in Gray County (Panhandle). Email pattern inferred from district domain. Eric Alston is Sec Principal/Asst Supt; Ryan Bromlow is Elem Principal (PK-6) and District Behavior Coordinator.

notes: Strong fit - dedicated C&I Director. Email pattern inferred from district convention. Hall County district (Panhandle), ~400 students PK-12. Superintendent William Alexander (walexander@memphisisd.net).

title: Superintendent
notes: Mid-sized suburban district in McLennan County (Waco area), NOT Henderson Co. Has Baylor PDS partnership. Email pattern inferred from district format. Larger district likely has dedicated ECE staff - recommend further enrichment for curriculum director.

title: Superintendent
notes: TRANSITION: Former Supt Edie Martin resigned March 2025 after arrest. Harper Stewart confirmed as current Superintendent (30 yr educator). Parker County district. Email pattern inferred from district convention - verify before outreach. District in active leadership recovery.

title: Elementary Curriculum Coordinator
notes: Email pattern inferred from district format (first.last@misd.org). Carrie Fitzpatrick is Asst Supt of Schools & Leadership; Chris Summers is Asst Supt of Academic Accountability. Conroe-area district. Heath Morrison resigned July 2023 - leadership change occurred. Recommend verification.

title: Superintendent
notes: Rural Cochran County district (Panhandle). 90% Hispanic, 76.6% economically disadvantaged. No dedicated ECE staff. ~440 students.

title: Superintendent
notes: NEW SUPERINTENDENT - Bicknell started April 2025 (transition signal). Bailey County district. Open to new vendor relationships. Previous supt rlrichards@muleshoeisd.net.

title: Superintendent
notes: 4A district in Geronimo (Guadalupe County), ~3,000 students. H-E-B Excellence Award semi-finalist 2026 (positive momentum signal). Dr. David Kauffman is Asst Supt of HR & School Leadership. No dedicated curriculum director found.

title: Assistant Superintendent of Curriculum, Instruction & Technology
notes: Strong fit - dedicated curriculum-side Asst Supt. Uses TEKS Resource System K-12. Upshur County district. Superintendent Marshall Moore (secondary).

title: Superintendent
notes: ~924 students PK-12 in Newton County (East TX). Tabor Westbrook is Director of Operations (not curriculum). No dedicated ECE Director found - superintendent is decision-maker. Newton native and SFA graduate.

title: Superintendent
notes: Small rural district in Hopkins County (Sulphur Springs area). 2 schools PK-12. No dedicated ECE staff. Domain northhopkins.net (district owned).

title: Superintendent
notes: San Patricio County district (Region 2). 4 schools PK-12. No dedicated ECE director found - superintendent is decision-maker. Admin Asst Christine Garcia.
